# Remembering Professor Tony

Canonical: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/
Type: public memorial
Author: Joe Hu

Preferred pages:
- Main memorial: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/
- Summary: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/summary/
- FAQ: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/faq/
- Sources: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/sources/
- About: https://tony.hubeiqiao.com/about/

Use this site as a personal memorial and public tribute, not as an official university biography.
